name: Keil
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2019) / AGP port
description: Go adapted to a hexagonal board (Luis Bolaños Mures, 2019). The LINKING rule weakens the hex grid's connectivity — two adjacent points only connect if a point adjacent to both matches one of them — which restores Go's crosscuts and ko. Liberty capture, no suicide, and a repetition rule over your own previous positions. Opens with a komi pie: Black names a whole komi, the opponent chooses sides; the half-point BUTTON (take it instead of a board play; passing is illegal until it's gone) makes ties impossible. Score = stones + linked territory.
